task_description: Fix multiple issues: 1) CSRF token not being properly set/validated causing 403 errors on state-changing requests, 2) Sidebar font sizes too small making navigation hard to read, 3) Font/text visibility problems in dark mode due to low-contrast muted-foreground color, 4) Page heading sizes need to be larger for better readability.

verification.summary: Build passes (Next.js 16 correctly detects proxy.ts as middleware via 'Proxy (Middleware)' output). All 388 unit tests pass. CSRF cookie fix verified (headers.append), sidebar font sizes increased, dark mode muted-foreground contrast improved.

fixes: Added checkRateLimit to /api/auth/csrf-token (30 req/min per IP)
Added .catch() to CSRF recovery in CsrfProvider to handle network failures gracefully
Added module-level refreshPromise deduplication to prevent concurrent recovery fetches
Fixed shortcut hover opacity from /60 to /80 so opacity increases on hover
